zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure於1336年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登努時，她的父親Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure26歲，母親Mary DeCarrick16歲。她於1359年與John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。她去世於1395年在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾福布斯享年59歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure于1336年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾登努时，她的父亲Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure26岁，母亲Mary DeCarrick16岁。她于1359年与John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。她去世于1395年在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾福布斯享年59岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure was born in 1336, in Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure, was 26 and her mother, Mary DeCarrick, was 16. She married John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes in 1359, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. She died in 1395, in Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 59, and was buried in Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure est née en 1336, à Dunure, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary DeCarrick, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes en 1359, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Elle est décédée en 1395, à Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure 1336 in Dunure, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure 26 und ihre Mutter Mary DeCarrick 16. Sie hat 1359 in Scotland John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Sie starb 1395 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Aberdeenshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure è nata il nel 1336 nel Dunure, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mary DeCarrick, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes nel 1359, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì nel 1395, nel Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunureが1336年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダヌアで生まれた時，父Sir John Kennedy Of Dunureは26歳，母Mary DeCarrickは16歳であった。1359年にスコットランドでJohn - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼女は1395年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアフォーベズで59歳で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure(이)가 1336년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary DeCarrick(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1359년 스컷랜드에서 John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1395년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 포베스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure nasceu em 1336, em Dunure, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary DeCarrick, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes em 1359, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1395, em Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure родилась в 1336 г. в местности дунур, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary DeCarrick, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes в 1359 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Она умерла в 1395 г. в местности форбесь, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности абирдиншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Kennedy of Dunure nació en 1336, en Dunure, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary DeCarrick, tenía 16 años. Se casó con John - of the Black Lip Forbes of Forbes en 1359, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1395, en Forbes, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Aberdeenshire, Scotland.
